Event: Magic Well - December 2023
Event Date: 01/12/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: B30


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Ranger Chest
Horned Sniper Bow

When attacking, has a 20-22% chance of dealing 75-90% damage to a group of enemies.
Once in a while, the unit fires an enhanced arrow that deals 300000 physical damage and increases the cooldown time of the target's weapon, armor, and artifact abilities by 3 sec for 5 sec. When the effect wears off, the target is stunned for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
